graph.description: Credentials for the Entra ID app registration used to call Microsoft Graph. Grant it the application permissions your mutations need (e.g. User.ReadWrite.All, Mail.ReadWrite, Calendars.ReadWrite, Files.ReadWrite.All, Sites.ReadWrite.All) and have a tenant admin consent to them.
graph.certificatePasswordHint: Optional — only required for encrypted PEM files

openRouter.description: Optional. When set, mail mutations use OpenRouter to generate random subject lines and message bodies. Without a key, a random GUID is used instead.
openRouter.apiKeyHint: Stored as plaintext under the data directory, like the Graph secret.
openRouter.modelHint: OpenRouter model id. Defaults to openai/gpt-4o-mini.
